creator: freebsd@omarpolo.com
text:
Created attachment 228149
update to 1.7.4

Hello,

please find attached the diff to update net/gmid to its latest version.  The changelog is available here:

https://git.omarpolo.com/gmid/tag/?h=1.7.4

> This version includes the following bugfix:
>
>  - fix a possible out-of-bound access when handling a request for
>    a non-existent file in the root directory of a vhost that's
>    matched by the `cgi` option
>
> and the relative regression test.

Thanks
